instruction: 帮我把项目预算情况记一下

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '项目'
ws['B1'] = '预算(万元)'
ws['C1'] = '已用(万元)'
ws['A2'] = '官网改版'
ws['B2'] = 30
ws['C2'] = 18
ws['A3'] = 'App开发'
ws['B3'] = 120
ws['C3'] = 85
ws['A4'] = '数据中台'
ws['B4'] = 80
ws['C4'] = 62
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/project_budget.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 帮我把项目预算情况记一下
从/home/user/Desktop/project_budget.xlsx中计算App开发项目的预算使用率（已用/预算），在/home/user/Desktop/budget_memo.txt末尾追加：'App开发预算使用率：70.8%'，保存
